title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology's Jeff Crume discusses OpenClaw security risks in autonomous AI agents, including prompt injection and credential exposure. The analysis covers vulnerabilities arising from agent autonomy, tool use, and memory systems.
